description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Create Test Release that triggers on push events with tags starting with 't*'. The workflow runs on a windows-latest environment, checks out the repository with submodules, sets up .NET 7.0.100-preview.7.22377.5, restores dependencies, downloads Dalamud, builds the project with a custom version based on the tag, and creates a release with the build artifact. Additionally, it updates a JSON file with the version, archives the build, and commits the updated JSON file to a test branch.
